rationale: Educ. Code §11.255 governs dropout prevention review by district and campus planning committees. It has no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises.
quote: Each district-level planning and decision-making committee and each campus-level planning and decision-making committee for a junior, middle, or high school campus shall analyze information related to dropout prevention
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemptions or property tax.
